decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_bx41-limited-2012 matches the existing registry record with the same ID, which already covers the same source (2012_10_brt_webster_cac3_meeting_summary) and describes the same Bx41 Limited service along Webster Avenue in the Bronx. No different registry record is a better canonical match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The first part of the workshop activity focused on discussing proposed SBS station locations, comparing them to the current Bx41 Limited stops.

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_bx36 matches the existing registry record route_bx36, which already covers the same source (2012_10_brt_webster_cac3_meeting_summary) and describes the same Bx36 crosstown local bus in the Bronx. No different registry record is a better canonical match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transfer point to the crosstown Bx36 bus. The Bx41 also intersects the Bx36 at E Tremont Avenue.

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_bx55-2012 matches the existing registry record route_bx55-2012, which already covers the same source (2012_10_brt_webster_cac3_meeting_summary) and describes the same Bx55 route in the context of Webster Avenue SBS planning.
